description_long: This object is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a boxy, utilitarian design and a matte black finish. It features a prominent cylindrical suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, extending its length significantly. The receiver is rectangular with minimal external ornamentation, and a vertical magazine protrudes from the grip area. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, and the weapon has a simple iron sight system on top. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components likely used for the grip and magazine.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a large suppressor, boxy receiver, and vertical magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, including the suppressor, magazine, and trigger assembly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the suppressor, receiver, and magazine from the other profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the end of the magazine.
